  "decision": "fail",

  "percent_complete": 75,

  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Over-greasing has occurred, resulting in a purged/blown seal during the lubrication phase of bearing installation."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately to prevent further contamination or damage.",
    "Remove the damaged/purged seal.",
    "Clean out excess grease to meet the manufacturer's specified fill volume (typically 30% to 50% of free space).",
    "Inspect the bearing for any displacement or damage caused by excessive pressure.",
    "Install a new, undamaged seal before proceeding with final assembly."
  ],
  "rationale": "Over-greasing has blown the seal (purged seal), which compromises the bearing's protection against contaminants and leads to premature failure. According to SKF/Timken mounting and lubrication guides, the seal must be replaced, excess grease must be purged/cleaned to the correct fill level, and the assembly must be verified before work can continue.",
  "references": [
    "SKF Bearing Installation and Maintenance Guide",
    "Timken Engineering Manual - Lubrication and Seals Section"
  ]
}
